Done! Here's what I've prepared:

- **`nemoclaw/src/lib/eval-status-command.ts`** — a small helper that reads an optional `NEMOCLAW_STATUS` environment variable and falls back to `'idle'`.
- **`test/eval-status-command.test.ts`** — a Vitest test confirming the default `'idle'` return value.

Both files are currently untracked (not staged, not committed), so you can review them before deciding whether to commit. Let me know if you'd like to add more test cases (e.g., exercising the env-variable override) or adjust the behavior.
